title: Big K Kiln Dry Hardwood Logs
features: High heat output with less smoke and a better flame
FSC certified and Woodsure Ready to Burn accredited
Ideal for stoves, chimineas, fire pits, pizza oven fuel, cookers and open fire
description: Big K Kiln Dry Hardwood Logs Versatile, high performing and definitely efficient, our Kiln Dried Hardwood Logs are ready for pretty much anything. These sustainable, environmentally friendly and renewable logs can handle multi-fuel and wood-burning stoves, chimineas, fire pits, pizza ovens, cookers and open fires – no problems at all. The secret lies in their low and consistent moisture content. Not only does this make them easier to light and use, they also perform better due to the smaller number of impurities that accompanies a lower level of internal moisture. With cleaner burns, hotter temperatures less smoke and higher efficiency, our Kiln Dried Hardwood Logs deliver on multiple fronts. High performance and fantastic value doesn’t mean that we have to compromise on quality or our ethics. Sourced from sustainable Birch, our long-lasting Kiln Dried logs are FSC® certified and Woodsure accredited, so you can have peace of mind knowing that each log is sustainably sourced and of a high quality. Try Big K’s Kiln Dried Hardwood Logs today and experience the benefits of proper fuel.
